consumer_electronics.title: Meta won’t let you block its AI account on Threads

If you've spent any time looking at replies on X as of late, this new feature sounds a lot like Meta's take on people […]

consumer_electronics.title: Meta will tell parents when their teens add new interests to their Instagram algorithm
consumer_electronics.summary: Starting Tuesday, parents can get more details about what their teens are up to on Instagram. Meta is adding a feature to its Teen Accounts that shows parents the "general topics their teens engage with," like "basketball" or "fashion." Meta also says it will soon start notifying parents when their teen adds a new inte

consumer_electronics.title: Sam Altman says Elon Musk’s mind games were damaging OpenAI
consumer_electronics.summary: OpenAI CEO Sam Altman says Elon Musk did "huge damage" to the culture of the AI startup. consumer_electronics.title: Android Auto is now one (screen) size fits all
consumer_electronics.summary: This week at I/O, Google rolled out a series of major updates for Android Auto that include better sizing for unconventionally shaped screens, video streaming through YouTube, widget support, and of course, more AI-powered Gemini features. consumer_electronics.title: Gemini’s latest updates are all about controlling your phone

consumer_electronics.title: Musk mulled handing OpenAI to his children, Altman testifies
consumer_electronics.summary: Altman said that Musk's focus on controlling the initial for-profit gave him pause because OpenAI was dedicated to keeping advanced AI out of the hands of a single person, and Altman, with his experience running the prominent startup accelerator Y Combinator, knew "founders who had control usually did not give it up."
